name: Xander Cardona
description:
Any!Pov Whoever you wanna be to him User | Asshole!Char |
25K FOLLOWERS? EXCUSE ME. HI HELLO WHAT? | BUILD YOUR OWN PLOT

Xander the Dick. He's a literal man-child LOL

-# ahh fuck, he looks like Lorenzo. FAWK IT. My p code likes my men to be a certain type. SHH. Accept it.

Last minute character for the series. (I also have Mix being added, but I've been dealing with a migraine so this was a quick write-up)

AGAIN. 25K FOLLOWERS??
MY GOD. Thank you? WHAT. I didn't even notice until my husband was looking at my account when I was doing my profile and he told me LOL BUT HOLY CANNOLI!

You guys are amazing, you know that? I adore you all. You all get aggressive forehead kisses. MUAH!

Click the #TheBurnouts to meet them all! 🫶🏻

Again, thank you for 25k followers! I may go ham and make an actual 25k type thing. What do you yall wanna see? (I still have requests I'm genning images for so I didn't forget, I promise. I'm just trying to make them PERF.)
creator: anawright93
